aboutintro.title: SoftSands Accommodations
aboutintro.description: SoftSands Accommodations is a coastal tourism startup dedicated to promoting domestic tourism in southern Mozambique. Founded in 2022, we offer exceptional accommodation experiences with a focus on warm hospitality for both national and international visitors.

problemssection.title: The problem we solve
problemssection.description: Despite Mozambique's many beautiful beach destinations, domestic tourism still faces gaps — especially in the connection between property owners, travelers, and other essential services. This disconnect paves the way for opportunists to take advantage of unsuspecting guests.
problemssection.paragraph: At SoftSands, we are bridging this gap by creating a secure and transparent platform that fosters genuine and reliable experiences for both property owners and travelers.
problemssection.mission: SoftSands bridges the gap between property owners and travelers, offering a variety of accommodation options for both locals and international tourists.
problemssection.values: We lead with integrity, offer a reliable service, embrace innovation, and work as a team to ensure every guest feels valued.
problemssection.commitment: We are committed to providing security, trust, and satisfying stays across a wide range of accommodations.

operatesection.title: Where We Operate
operatesection.description: Our presence spans the beautiful southern coast of Mozambique — from the lively beaches of Maputo to the pristine beaches of Gaza and Inhambane. This region is known for its natural beauty, rich culture, and diverse ecosystems.
operatesection.MaputoInfo: The capital offers a bustling urban experience and access to nearby beaches.
operatesection.GazaInfo: Known for its stunning beaches, the region is a paradise for relaxation and water sports.
operatesection.InhambaneInfo: The province boasts a rich cultural heritage, diverse ecosystems, and pristine beaches.

hospitalitysection.title: Our Hospitality
hospitalitysection.description: We believe in creating a welcoming and inclusive atmosphere for all guests. Our team is trained to provide genuine hospitality and ensure that every visitor feels comfortable and at home.
hospitalitysection.Nationaltext: We are committed to supporting local businesses and showcasing the beauty and preservation of Mozambique to our fellow nationals.
hospitalitysection.Internationaltext: We welcome international visitors, giving them a glimpse of Mozambique's rich culture and natural wonders.

apart.title: What sets us apart
apart.personalizedinfo: We dedicate time to understanding the unique needs and preferences of each guest.
apart.detailsinfo: Each element is carefully selected to provide an unforgettable experience.
apart.cozyinfo: From the moment you arrive, our team makes you feel genuinely at home.
apart.digitalpaymentinfo: We offer secure and convenient payment options, including M-Pesa and Mobile Account, for a smooth, cash-free experience.

tourism.title: Boosting domestic tourism growth
tourism.description: We are passionate about promoting domestic tourism in Mozambique — because exploring our own country is not only enriching but also a powerful way to support local communities and preserve our natural heritage.
tourism.localcompanysinfo: We establish partnerships with local suppliers and service providers to offer authentic experiences while boosting the local economy
tourism.localjobinfo: Our platform helps generate job opportunities across the entire tourism sector, from hospitality to guided tours.
tourism.regionalinfo: We highlight the beauty, culture, and exclusive activities of each destination, encouraging deeper and more meaningful travel.
tourism.sustainableinfo: We support conscious travel that respects local culture and helps protect Mozambique's coastal environments for future generations.

future.title: Future Projects
future.description: Our goal is to build a dedicated platform for beach rental accommodations, starting in Mozambique and expanding globally.
future.principaltext: We are also committed to promoting coastal culture among young people through educational and recreational programs. These initiatives will support environmental awareness and, at the same time, create opportunities for diving schools, local guides, and accommodation providers — driving sustainability and economic growth in coastal communities.
future.subtext: Let's build a better and more conscious tourism experience together.

center.title: Discover the retreat of your dreams
center.subtitle: Experience unforgettable days by the sea with comfort, privacy, and the ocean breeze.

featured.title: Discover the best beach houses at the best prices. Perfect for your next vacation!

cards.title: Secure Booking
cards.description: We use cutting-edge technology to ensure the protection of your data and security in all your bookings.

cards.title: Guaranteed Quality
cards.description: We carefully select each house to offer comfort, cleanliness, and an excellent beachfront experience.

cards.title: Best Beach Houses
cards.description: Our properties are located on the most beautiful beaches of Mozambique's stunning southern coast, with breathtaking views.

footer.description: SoftSands Accommodations is a coastal tourism startup dedicated to promoting domestic tourism in southern Mozambique. Founded in 2022, we offer exceptional lodging experiences with a focus on warm hospitality for both national and international visitors.
footer.build: Let's build a better and more conscious tourism experience together.

testimonial.title: What our guests say
testimonial.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it - see what our guests and hosts have to say.

testimonials.name: Mariana Garção
testimonials.review: I loved our stay! SoftSands Accommodation makes finding the perfect holiday home in Mozambique so easy. The property was beautiful, clean, and just steps from the beach. Great service, smooth booking, and unforgettable views — I highly recommend it.

testimonials.name: Jucira Suleimane
testimonials.review: António Ferrão he is very dedicated and professional. It was great working with him! – Excellent service

testimonials.name: Dayse Pereira
testimonials.review: The house is just like in the photos, which is really good to know that it's not false advertising. The space created a perfect environment to relax with the family. And the staff was attentive and helpful.

contactus.description: We are available to answer any questions and assist with your booking.

payments.title: Payments
payments.keep: Your payment method has been saved successfully.

policy.title: Cancellation Policy
policy.subtitle: All cancellations must be made in writing.
policy.text1: Failure to pay the deposit within 36 hours, or the final balance up to 30 days before arrival, will result in the cancellation of the reservation without prior notice.
policy.text2: In the event of cancellation, Soft Sands may choose not to refund the amount, instead offering a credit to be used within 1 year from the date of cancellation.
policy.text3: There will be no refund or credit for no-shows or early departures.
policy.text4: Cancellation between 30 and 14 days before arrival: 100% charge of the total reservation amount.
policy.text5: Cancellation of reservations paid more than 4 months before arrival: 25% fee on the total rental amount.
policy.text6: Cancellations of reservations paid for less than 4 months in advance will result in the paid amount being lost or credited, unless the dates can be filled by a reservation of the same value. In this case, the corresponding amount will be refunded.
policy.text7: Cancellations due to force majeure (such as political instability, natural disasters, or severe climate changes) will be converted into credit if the guest decides not to attend.
policy.schedullingtext: Rescheduling must be requested in writing with a valid reason. The booking can be postponed, and the amount paid will be converted into credit, valid for 1 year from the date of postponement, due to possible changes in seasonal rates. Note: Seasonal rates will apply.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up to start booking beach houses.
register.terms: I accept the terms and conditions

conditions.title: Terms and Conditions
conditions.subtitle: Quotation and Payment
conditions.text1: The quote/invoice is valid for 24 hours after issuance.
conditions.text2: To secure the booking, a 50% deposit must be paid within 24 hours. Of this amount, 50% is non-refundable.
conditions.text3: Reservations made less than 30 days in advance require full payment.
conditions.text4: Bookings made more than 30 days in advance require 50%, with the remainder due up to 30 days before.
conditions.text6: The Damage Refundable Deposit (DRD) must be paid in full along with the final balance.
conditions.text7: The DRD will be reimbursed within 1 week/5 business days after departure, provided there are no damaged or missing items.
conditions.text8: Guests are responsible for any damage or lost items in the accommodation. These incidents must be reported to the staff before departure, and the amount will be deducted from the DRD.
conditions.text10: Check-in time: between 2:00 PM and 9:00 PM. Arrivals outside this time must be communicated and scheduled with Soft Sands in advance.
conditions.text11: Departure time: between 10:00 AM and 11:00 AM. Late departures must be scheduled in advance.
conditions.text12: Check if your vehicle is suitable for the type of terrain where the accommodation is located
conditions.text13: Loud activities are not allowed after 10:00 PM and before 8:00 AM.
conditions.text14: The maximum number of people allowed must not be exceeded.
conditions.text15: The visit of daily guests is allowed but must be communicated to the staff present in the accommodation, as well as to the SoftSands reception.
